message:
bench: update CPU benchmarks with original vExcess implementations

Update mandelbrot, gaussian_blur, path_trace, prime_factors with
original algorithms from https://github.com/vExcess/js-engine-bench
scaled down for EdgeBox:
- mandelbrot: 200x200, 100 iterations (was 600x600, 200)
- gaussian_blur: 50x50 (was 800x800)
- path_trace: 50x50 (was 210x210)
- prime_factors: 2000 numbers (was 9450)
